name: power_opt_design
short_description: Optimize dynamic power using intelligent clock gating
full_help:
power_opt_design

Description: 
Optimize dynamic power using intelligent clock gating

Syntax: 
power_opt_design  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Power

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
